text: First, observing the classroom, I feel a sense of curiosity and quiet detachment—an outsider peering into a collective moment of learning, conscious of the boundary that glass creates between observer and participants. Second, standing before the vibrant R+D wall, I feel energized and inspired by the ideas of innovation and the invitation to explore the interplay between humans and technology. Both scenes illuminate the tension and excitement that come with seeking knowledge—in groups and alone.
